summary: Walt Disney discusses the immense financial risks and timeline of producing Snow White, the origins of Fantasia with Leopold Stokowski, and the necessity of creating his own internal art school to train animators in capturing motion rather than static figures.

principles.statement: Invest early capital into specialized training for your team.
principles.rationale: Existing educational institutions may not teach the specific, cutting-edge skills your new medium requires, so you must build that capability internally.
principles.source_quote: the first thing I did when I got a little money to experiment I put all my artists back in school

principles.statement: Animation is about the flow of movement, not just drawing.
principles.rationale: Traditional art focuses on static figures, but animation requires mastering continuous motion, action, and reaction.
principles.source_quote: we were dealing in in motion movement and the flow of movement the flow of things you know Action Reaction all of that

mental_models.name: Static vs. Dynamic Art
mental_models.description: Contrasting traditional art education, which focuses on capturing a 'static figure', with the needs of animation, which requires understanding 'the flow of movement' and 'Action Reaction'.
mental_models.example: Setting up an internal art school at Disney because existing schools didn't teach the dynamic flow required to advance animated cartoons.

signature_quotes.text: we had the the family fortune we had everything wrapped up in know white in fact the the banker I think was losing more sleep than I was
signature_quotes.context: Discussing the massive financial risk taken to produce Snow White.

signature_quotes.text: I was always known as the perfectionist until I met stoski
signature_quotes.context: Joking about the high standards and costs associated with working with conductor Leopold Stokowski on Fantasia.

signature_quotes.text: the first thing I did when I got a little money to experiment I put all my artists back in school
signature_quotes.context: Explaining how he advanced the technical quality of his animated cartoons.

signature_quotes.text: we were dealing in in motion movement and the flow of movement the flow of things you know Action Reaction all of that
signature_quotes.context: Describing why traditional art schools were insufficient for training animators.

anti_patterns.description: Relying on traditional art schools to train animators.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: Traditional art schools focus on static figures, which fails to teach the flow of movement, action, and reaction required for animation.
